CustomField.description: FormulaEval expression defining when a task should be created.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter a Salesforce formula expression (e.g., AND(ISPICKVAL(Status,'New'), Rating__c > 3)). Use standard formula functions like AND, OR, ISPICKVAL, ISBLANK. The formula evaluates against the triggering record.
CustomField.label: Condition Formula
